historical_context.summary: Luoyang was explored as a Premium supplier. Initial packaging and feather quality were not validated. Decision taken to freeze Premium in BUILD while focusing RUN on Songpet.
past_decisions: No pricing or logistics discussions allowed
Packaging R&D required before any reconsideration

match_to_product.mismatch_notes: Sample received with OPP/carton; promised kraft box not provided. Packaging too large; feathers damaged in transit.

audit.note: Alignement BUILD/HOLD v2.2.0 : Luoyang conservé uniquement pour PREMIUM (R&D packaging). Blocage production/devis/bulk tant que packaging premium non validé et Amazon RUN non stabilisé.

scope.policy: Aucune production ni devis ferme avant validation packaging premium et stabilisation Amazon RUN (Songpet).

open_questions: Proposer 2–3 options réelles de packaging premium (kraft rigide / étui / boîte / protection plumes).
Fournir mensurations exactes (L×l×h) du packaging retenu + surfaces planes exploitables (avant/arrière/FNSKU).
Confirmer capacité à imprimer et coller 3 stickers (avant, arrière légal, FNSKU séparé).
Fournir photos/vidéo du packaging avec produit inside avant toute décision.

strategic_positioning.decision_rule: No Premium production before Amazon RUN stabilization (Songpet).

critical_points: Packaging must protect feathers during transport and FBA handling

rules: Insert must be placed INSIDE the bag; recommended coverage ≈ 2/3 of bag height to hide inner raphia strands while keeping both ends and feathers visible.

principles: Compromis premium: kraft-like si possible; fallback OPP acceptable.
Aucun engagement MOQ élevé uniquement pour l’emballage.
Photos réelles et mesures requises avant passage READY/LIVE.

safety.warning_text_bilingual: ⚠️ Avertissement / Warning — Pour éviter tout risque d’étouffement, tenez ce sac en plastique hors de portée des bébés et des enfants. To avoid danger of suffocation, keep this plastic bag away from babies and children. Do not use in cribs, beds, carriages, or playpens.
